summary: Implemented a hardware-independent 32-joint KinectFrame data model and deterministic synthetic mock/replay source.
risks: This is synthetic mock/replay behavior only; no Kinect hardware, Azure SDK, or live-device behavior was tested.
The test-only conftest.py adds the repository src directory to sys.path for the src-layout package.
next_action: Run independent validation and submit for human review; do not merge automatically.
